title: Updating Context
description: Combine context with state to provide dynamic values and updaters.

slides.title: Making Context Dynamic 🔄
slides.content:
# Context + State = Reactive Data

Context itself doesn't manage state; it just passes values. To make context updatable, you can pass both the value and a setter function (or an object with methods) as the context value.

## Pattern

1. Create a context that holds an object with `value` and `setValue` (or multiple fields).
2. In the Provider component, use `useState` and pass both state and setter.
3. Consumers can then read and update the shared state.

slides.title: Example: Theme Toggler
slides.content: A theme context that can be updated:

quizData.question: You can pass functions through context to allow components to update the shared state.
quizData.explanation: Yes, context can hold any value, including functions, so you can pass updaters down.
